TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_tatu', title = tatu', year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/tatu'} }

S.FORM: == tatu' == tatu' ru qabay ga mtnaq, te kyahu na nqwaq.
== tatu' == tatu' ru qabay ga mtnaq, te kyahu na nqwaq.
S.PHON: == tatuʔ == tatuʔ ru qaβaj ɣa mtnaq, te kjaħu na nqwaq.
